title: The Monkey Dweller
description: The Monkey Dweller lives on the surface stalking and hunting anyone in its sight.
body:
The Monkey Dweller lives on the surface stalking and hunting anyone in its sight. It plays sounds, it runs around, and it exists.  The monkey dweller will be getting new updates with new features every so often.


![monkey dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93eac6c3799d89ae3598ec2e8ca6b63062bf0f9.png)
Requires Geckolib:

(https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
